do: Run the road north — the entrance waypoint activates by itself
Enter The Forest Encampment
steps.layout: Linear like The Ledge — river on one side, cliffs on the other.

do: Nothing to turn in yet — quick shop check (Yeena sells gems + flasks)
Exit east to The Old Fields
Follow the winding road east — Gneiss blocks it partway, kill or skirt him
IF you spot The Den (either side of the road, near the far end): dip in, kill the Great White Beast — Yeena's turn-in offers a SECOND Quicksilver Flask
Exit to The Crossroads
Tag the waypoint where the roads meet
Head north-west past the cliffs to The Chamber of Sins Level 1
steps.layout: Three exits off the WP: NW → Chamber of Sins, NE road → Broken Bridge, SE road → Fellshrine. You'll use all three.

do: Tag the waypoint
Find the stairs down — cross the central atrium, then check the corridors off the four-exit room
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (sawblades) — second of six for Normal Lab
Kill Fidelitas at the end (past the Piety scene)
Grab the BALEFUL GEM from the Strange Device and talk to Helena
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Necromancers here curse with Conductivity — a little lightning res helps. A side room can have free level-1 gems on the floor.

do: Talk to Helena in town — completes Intruders in Black; take the gem reward from Greust; she sets up The Root of the Problem
If you killed the Great White Beast: flask reward from Yeena
Waypoint → The Crossroads
Take the road north-east to The Broken Bridge
Follow the road to the bridge at the far end — BANDIT 1: kill Kraityn, take his amulet
Default route = kill all three bandits → +1 passive point from Eramir
LOGOUT to town, then WP → The Crossroads
steps.tip: Prefer a bandit buff over the point? Alira (+15% all res) is great for res-starved builds, Oak (+40 life) for tanky ones — you still kill the other two, only spare your pick.

do: Take the road south-east to The Fellshrine Ruins
Follow the road south-east to the ruined church
Enter The Crypt Level 1 by the church
steps.layout: The road forks then rejoins — either branch works.

do: Tag the waypoint by the entrance
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (spinning blades) — third of six
Take the stairs down to The Crypt Level 2
Find the big bridge room — grab the GOLDEN HAND from the altar
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Archbishop Geofri guards nothing you need — skip him.

do: Turn in the Golden Hand → Yeena's Book of Skill (+1 passive, +2 respec — Through Sacred Ground)
Exit west to The Riverways
Follow the stone road south-west, tag the waypoint on the way
Continue down the road to The Western Forest
steps.layout: The Wetlands exit is the break in the road with two pillars right by the WP — that's for later.

do: Tag the waypoint on the road
A torch + stone path off the road marks Alira's camp — BANDIT 2: kill Alira, take her amulet
Enter The Weaver's Chambers on the opposite side of the road (webbed cave)
Push through the web maze to the end chamber — the Weaver drops from the ceiling
Kill it, grab MALIGARO'S SPIKE
Exit back to The Western Forest
Follow the road south to the Blackguard camp — kill Captain Arteri, take the Thaumetic Emblem
Use the emblem on the Thaumetic Seal at the blocked pass (The Way Forward)
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: That seal is +1 passive from Bestel back in Act 1 — don't skip Arteri.

do: Turn in Maligaro's Spike → support gem from Silk (Sharp and Cruel)
WP → Lioneye's Watch: Bestel's Book of Skill (+1 passive — The Way Forward)
WP → The Riverways, take the pillared break in the road to The Wetlands
Oak's camp is on the central hill — BANDIT 3: kill Oak, take his amulet
Tag the waypoint in the west, right at the Vaal Ruins door
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Oak is tanky and hits hard — don't facetank him at zone level. ~Level 18 here is on pace.

do: Give Eramir all three amulets → +1 passive point and THE APEX (Deal with the Bandits)
Keep The Apex — it unlocks the act boss
Waypoint → The Wetlands
At the Vaal Ruins door next to the WP: use the Spike + Baleful Gem on the tree roots (The Root of the Problem)
Enter The Vaal Ruins
Maze — push through and TOUCH THE ANCIENT SEAL (yes, unleashing the Darkness is the plan)
Take the stairs behind it up to The Northern Forest
steps.tip: The Corruption Altar here is one free Vaal-orb corrupt — gamble a spare item or gem if you like.

do: Tag the waypoint
Head for The Caverns — skip The Dread Thicket
Linear cave — tag the waypoint at the midpoint
Keep pushing into the pyramid base and enter The Ancient Pyramid
Climb the four floors to the Pyramid Apex
Activate the Dark Altar (consumes nothing — needs The Apex in inventory) and kill the Vaal Oversoul
Exit past the arena → Act 3
steps.tip: Stay mobile — dodge the slams and falling rocks. Target: level 22-23 leaving Act 2.
